title: About
heading: About BarkinMad Studios
intro: Independent UK software and game development studio creating mobile apps, retro-inspired games, business tools, websites, and digital solutions for iPhone, iPad, and the web.

hero.alt: BarkinMad Studios development workspace showcasing game and software creation

sections.heading: Who We Are
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios is an independent UK software and game development studio focused on creating mobile apps, retro-inspired games, websites, prototypes, and digital business tools.
The studio combines software development experience with practical problem solving, building products that are easy to use, maintain, and expand over time.
Whether developing arcade games for players or custom software for businesses, the goal is to create reliable solutions that deliver long-term value.
Operating as an independent studio allows projects to move quickly from concept to release while maintaining a strong focus on quality, usability, and continuous improvement.

sections.heading: Our Story
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios was founded with a simple goal: create software that is both enjoyable to use and practical to maintain.

What began as a personal passion for software development, retro gaming, and problem solving has grown into a studio focused on delivering mobile applications, games, websites, and business solutions.
The studio takes inspiration from classic computing and arcade experiences while embracing modern development practices, cloud technologies, and mobile platforms.
Every project is approached with the belief that software should solve problems, provide value, and continue improving through regular updates and user feedback.
By remaining independent, BarkinMad Studios can focus on long-term product quality, meaningful user experiences, and delivering solutions that genuinely help people and organisations.

sections.heading: Experience
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios draws on more than two decades of experience delivering technology solutions across a wide range of industries and business sectors.
This experience includes software development, mobile applications, cloud technologies, digital transformation, workflow automation, business systems, technical consultancy, and solution design.
Projects have ranged from small internal business tools and prototypes through to large-scale systems supporting thousands of users.
Working across different industries has provided valuable insight into how technology can improve productivity, simplify processes, and create measurable business benefits.
This broad experience influences every project, helping ensure solutions are practical, scalable, maintainable, and focused on achieving real outcomes.

sections.heading: Technical Expertise
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios combines experience across software development, mobile applications, cloud platforms, security-focused design, workflow automation, data management, analytics, localisation, and digital transformation projects.
The studio develops solutions using modern technologies and development practices, ensuring products remain reliable, maintainable, and adaptable as requirements evolve.

Technical expertise includes mobile application development, website platforms, API integration, cloud-hosted services, automation workflows, reporting systems, business intelligence solutions, and user-focused application design.
This broad technical background allows solutions to be designed with maintainability, performance, scalability, and usability in mind while remaining practical and cost-effective.

sections.heading: What We Make
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios develops a wide range of software products including mobile applications, retro-inspired games, websites, internal business tools, workflow automation systems, dashboards, prototypes, and proof-of-concept solutions.

Our mobile development work focuses primarily on iPhone and iPad applications built using modern Apple technologies. Applications are designed with performance, accessibility, localisation, and long-term maintainability in mind.
The studio also develops custom software solutions for businesses looking to streamline processes, automate repetitive tasks, improve reporting, centralise data, or modernise existing systems.

The public portfolio includes the [ZX Series](/zx-series) of retro-inspired arcade games, [The Game of Darts](/apps/gameofdarts) scoring application, productivity tools, and specialist mobile applications available for iPhone and iPad.

Alongside commercial software development, BarkinMad Studios continues to invest in original products including the [ZX Series](/zx-series), a growing collection of retro-inspired arcade games featuring shared achievements, leaderboards, progression systems, and multiplayer experiences.

Many projects begin as prototypes, allowing ideas to be tested quickly before committing to larger development efforts. This approach helps reduce risk while ensuring solutions remain focused on delivering measurable value.

sections.heading: The ZX Series
paragraphs: The [ZX Series](/zx-series) is BarkinMad Studios' flagship collection of retro-inspired arcade games for iPhone and iPad.

Inspired by classic arcade and home computer experiences, the series combines simple gameplay mechanics with modern features such as Game Center integration, achievements, leaderboards, multiplayer support, cloud-based progression, accessibility improvements, and multi-language support.
Current and available titles include [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake), [ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick), [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), and [ZXPong](/apps/zxpong).
Future titles currently planned include ZXMaze, ZXRacer, ZXTank, and ZXLabrador.

The long-term vision for the [ZX Series](/zx-series) is to build a connected ecosystem of games that share progression systems, rewards, achievements, and player identity while maintaining unique gameplay experiences.
The series continues to grow through regular updates, new releases, and improvements based on player feedback.

sections.heading: Business Services
paragraphs: In addition to creating games and mobile applications, BarkinMad Studios provides software development and consultancy services for businesses.

Services include custom software development, mobile app development, workflow automation, internal business tools, website and content platform development, business process improvement, and rapid prototyping.
The goal is to help organisations reduce manual effort, improve efficiency, increase visibility of operational data, and create scalable technology solutions that support long-term growth.
Projects can range from small proof-of-concepts and internal utilities through to larger business systems and digital transformation initiatives.
Learn more about our [software development and business services](/services).

sections.heading: How We Work
paragraphs: The focus is on practical software that solves real problems without unnecessary complexity.
Projects are approached with a strong emphasis on usability, maintainability, performance, and long-term value.
From early ideas and prototypes through to production-ready applications, BarkinMad Studios aims to keep development focused, transparent, and outcome-driven.
Regular testing, continuous improvement, and ongoing feedback help ensure products remain relevant and useful long after their initial release.
This approach allows solutions to evolve naturally as user needs, technology, and business requirements change over time.

sections.heading: BarkinMad Coins
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins are a gameplay reward used across supported BarkinMad Studios games.
Coins are earned through gameplay and can be used to unlock cosmetic content such as themes, colours, skins, and visual extras.
BarkinMad Coins have no cash value, cannot be transferred, and cannot be exchanged for real-world goods or services.
The system is designed to reward player engagement while providing a consistent progression experience across supported titles within the [ZX Series](/zx-series).

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
paragraphs: Q: Is BarkinMad Studios an independent developer? A: Yes. BarkinMad Studios is an independent UK software and game development company.
Q: What platforms do you support? A: Our primary focus is currently iPhone and iPad development, along with supporting web-based platforms and services.
Q: Do you provide custom software development services? A: Yes. We work on custom software projects, internal business tools, prototypes, workflow automation, and mobile applications.
Q: How can I provide feedback on an app or game? A: Feedback and support requests can be submitted through our [contact page](/contact) or by emailing support@barkinmad.studio.
Q: Are the ZX Series games connected? A: Yes. The [ZX Series](/zx-series) is designed as a connected collection of games with shared progression systems, achievements, leaderboards, and rewards.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For support, feedback, testing enquiries, partnership opportunities, business discussions, or software development enquiries, please visit our [contact page](/contact) or email support@barkinmad.studio.
BarkinMad Studios welcomes opportunities to discuss mobile applications, software projects, prototypes, business tools, and potential partnerships.
